# Diagnostics
warning: Capability 'Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/KubernetesResource.additionalResources' uses non-ATS type 'Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes.Resources.BaseKubernetesResource' and will be skipped. [Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes/KubernetesResource.additionalResources]
